commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch teaches `node.pair.remove` to remove node roles backed by `devices/paired.json`, shares device-management authz helpers, treats node removal as a credential-invalidating mutation, and adds gateway regression tests.

PR surface: Source +184, Tests +340. Total +524 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection of current main shows `node.list` includes device-backed node records while `node.pair.remove` only deletes legacy node-pairing records, matching #88488's `unknown nodeId` failure.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow mechanical repair can preserve the PR's gateway fix while restoring the existing pairing authorization contract.

target.title: fix(gateway): remove device-backed node pairings
target.author: alix-007

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
